description: Product Description TURTLE Kids Pyjamas Unisex 100% Cotton Woven Pajamas Nightwear Girls and Boys Comfortable Sleep Whether it's curling up with a book or drifting off after a busy day of play, TURTLE Pyjamas are designed to make your child feel calm, secure, and snug all night long.Available in multiple colours and sizes for ages 1 to 8. Choose from playful solids or charming prints to suit every personality. Smart Pocket Design Features a single chest pocket with contrast piping , adding a stylish yet classic touch. Comfort Collar Fit Designed with a soft-turn down collar for added comfort and timeless look. Elasticated Waistband Stretchable waistband ensures a snug, secure, and comfortable fit for active little sleepers. Full Button-Down Front Easy to wear and remove, even for toddlers—great for bedtime routines. No itchy tags or rough seams Great as a gift set Breathable for summer, easy to layer in winter True to size – no guesswork
